text: Ford F-150 | Engine: 3.5L EcoBoost V6; 5.0L V8 (optional) | Transmission: 10-speed automatic | Fuel: Gasoline | Seating: 5
Ford F-150 oil change interval: Every 7,500 miles or 6 months
Ford F-150 tire rotation schedule: Every 7,500 miles
Ford F-150 brake inspection frequency: Every 12 months or 12,000 miles
Ford F-150 warranty: 3 years / 36,000 miles basic; 5 years / 60,000 miles powertrain
Check engine light: Indicates emissions or engine issues; seek service.
Low oil pressure: Stop engine and check oil level immediately.
Service soon: Scheduled maintenance due based on mileage.
Tire pressure low: Inflate tires to recommended PSI.
If vehicle won't start: Check battery connections and fuses.
If ABS light is on: Schedule brake system inspection.
Ford Mustang | Engine: 2.3L EcoBoost I4; 5.0L V8 (GT) | Transmission: 6-speed manual; 10-speed automatic (optional) | Fuel: Gasoline | Seating: 4
Ford Mustang oil change interval: Every 7,500 miles or 6 months (performance engines may require more frequent service)
Ford Mustang tire rotation schedule: Every 5,000-7,500 miles
Ford Mustang brake inspection frequency: Every 12 months or 12,000 miles
Ford Mustang warranty: 3 years / 36,000 miles basic; 5 years / 60,000 miles powertrain
Engine temperature high: Pull over safely and allow engine to cool.
Low fuel: Refuel soon to avoid running out of fuel.
Oil life low: Change oil as soon as possible.
Service traction control: System requires inspection.
If check engine light blinks: Reduce speed and seek service.
If battery warning appears: Check alternator and battery connections.
Ford Explorer | Engine: 2.3L EcoBoost I4; 3.0L V6 (optional) | Transmission: 8-speed automatic | Fuel: Gasoline | Seating: 7
Ford Explorer oil change interval: Every 7,500 miles or 6 months
Ford Explorer tire rotation schedule: Every 7,500 miles
Ford Explorer brake inspection frequency: Every 12 months or 12,000 miles
Ford Explorer warranty: 3 years / 36,000 miles basic; 5 years / 60,000 miles powertrain
Low washer fluid: Refill reservoir.
Door ajar: Ensure all doors are closed before driving.
Service AWD: All-wheel-drive system requires inspection.
Tire pressure monitoring: Check and inflate tires.
If parking sensors fail: Check sensor area for dirt or obstructions.
If infotainment unresponsive: Restart system by turning vehicle off and on.
Ford Escape | Engine: 1.5L EcoBoost I3; 2.0L EcoBoost I4 | Transmission: 8-speed automatic | Fuel: Gasoline; Hybrid available | Seating: 5
Ford Escape oil change interval: Every 7,500 miles or 6 months (hybrid models may vary)
Ford Escape tire rotation schedule: Every 7,500 miles
Ford Escape brake inspection frequency: Every 12 months or 12,000 miles
Ford Escape warranty: 3 years / 36,000 miles basic; 5 years / 60,000 miles powertrain
Hybrid system warning: Seek dealer service for hybrid-specific issues.
Low fuel: Refuel soon.
Battery service required: Hybrid battery may need inspection.
Oil life low: Schedule oil change.
If traction control light stays on: Inspect tires and sensors.
If key fob not detected: Replace battery or use backup start procedure.
Ford Ranger | Engine: 2.3L EcoBoost I4 | Transmission: 10-speed automatic | Fuel: Gasoline | Seating: 5
Ford Ranger oil change interval: Every 7,500 miles or 6 months
Ford Ranger tire rotation schedule: Every 7,500 miles
Ford Ranger brake inspection frequency: Every 12 months or 12,000 miles
Ford Ranger warranty: 3 years / 36,000 miles basic; 5 years / 60,000 miles powertrain
4x4 system warning: Check transfer case and 4x4 components.
Low oil pressure: Stop engine and check oil level.
Towing mode: Follow towing guidelines in manual.
Service soon: Scheduled maintenance due.
If trailer sway detected: Reduce speed and check hitch.
If engine misfires: Check spark plugs and fuel system.
